title: Refreshed armadillo
body:
![lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d07fe18a9cf7fa90705c19b54e1aad304213c5.png)

Do you not like vanilla armadillos? Then this resource pack is perfect for you! With it, your armored dog can become a real armadillo. This resource pack also works with newer versions of Minecraft!
